differentials.name: CONGENITAL DISORDERS OF SEXUAL DIFFERENTIATION
differentials.raw: CONGENITAL DISORDERS OF SEXUAL DIFFERENTIATION (a)  pure gonadal dysgenesis = Turner syndrome (33%)

context: Amenorrhea Primary Amenorrhea Definition: (a)  no menarche by 16 years of age (b)  no thelarche / adrenarche by 14 years of age (c)  no menarche > 3 years after adrenarche + thelarche Cause: √  bilateral dysfunctional / streak gonads (b)  mixed gonadal dysgenesis √  testis + streak gonad Risk:   in 25% development of dysgerminoma / gonadoblastoma in dysgenetic gonads with Y chromosome
